items.title: OpenAI and Anthropic Sign Letter to Prevent AI-Developed Biological Weapons
items.summary: Leading AI labs, executives, and scientists are sending a letter to lawmakers urging them to improve tracking of synthetic DNA sequences that could be used for bioweapons.
